items.name: 001TMF/harness-forge
items.full_text: Turn Claude Code into its own Meta-Harness — a skill that evolves the scaffolding around a fixed model (memory, retrieval, context, prompts) via a native propose→score→Pareto loop. Native reimplementation of Meta-Harness (Lee et al. 2026).
